mapper.select: /* 조직 목록 조회 */ SELECT O.ORG_ID, O.ORG_NM, O.PARENT_ORG_ID, O.ORG_LEVEL, O.SORT_ORDER, O.USE_YN, O.CREATED_DT, O.UPDATED_DT FROM TB_ORG O WHERE O.USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY CAST(IFNULL(O.SORT_ORDER, '0') AS UNSIGNED) ASC

/* 조직별 사용자 목록 orgManage.selectUserList */ SELECT U.PROFILE_IMG_PATH, U.USER_ID, U.USER_NM, U.EMAIL, U.PHONE, U.ORG_ID, U.ACCT_STATUS_CD, C.DESCRIPTION AS ACCT_STATUS_DESC FROM TB_USER U LEFT JOIN TB_CODE C ON U.ACCT_STATUS_CD = C.CODE_ID AND C.CODE_GRP_ID = 'CG000001' WHERE U.ORG_ID = #{orgId} ORDER BY U.CREATE_DT DESC
mapper.insert: /* 조직 등록 orgManage.insertOrg */ INSERT INTO TB_ORG ( ORG_ID, ORG_NM, PARENT_ORG_ID, ORG_LEVEL, SORT_ORDER, USE_YN, CREATED_DT, UPDATED_DT ) VALUES ( #{orgId}, #{orgNm}, NULLIF(#{parentOrgId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ''), #{orgLevel}, #{sortOrder}, #{useYn}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.select: /* 조직 단건 조회 orgManage.selectOrgByOrgId */ SELECT ORG_ID, PARENT_ORG_ID, ORG_LEVEL, SORT_ORDER FROM TB_ORG WHERE ORG_ID = #{orgId}
/* 최상위 조직(ORG_LEVEL=1) 최대 정렬순서 조회 orgManage.selectMaxSortOrderByTopLevel */ SELECT IFNULL(MAX(CAST(SORT_ORDER AS UNSIGNED)), 0) FROM TB_ORG WHERE ORG_LEVEL = '1'
mapper.update: /* 조직 수정 orgManage.updateOrg */ UPDATE TB_ORG SET ORG_NM = #{orgNm}, PARENT_ORG_ID = #{parentOrgId}, ORG_LEVEL = #{orgLevel}, SORT_ORDER = #{sortOrder}, USE_YN = #{useYn}, UPDATED_DT = NOW() WHERE ORG_ID = #{orgId}
